ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the game started */,
  "white_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the white player */,
  "black_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the black player */,
  "white_elo" INTEGER /* Elo rating of the white player */,
  "black_elo" INTEGER /* Elo rating of the black player */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control for the game (e.g., 180+2) */,
  "opening_code" TEXT /* Code for the opening used in the game */,
  "opening_name" TEXT /* Name of the opening used in the game */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the game in moves */,
  "termination" TEXT /* Reason for the game's termination (e.g., Resign, Time forfeit) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., 1-0, 0-1, 1/2-1/2) */,
  "hero_points" INTEGER /* Hero points earned by the winning player */,
  "has_evaluation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game has an evaluation */,
  "has_increment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game has an increment */,
  "game_link" TEXT /* Link to the game on the chess platform */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game (e.g., Blitz, Rapid, Classical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_time_control FOREIGN KEY ("time_control") REFERENCES time_controls ("time_control"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_white_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("white_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opening_code FOREIGN KEY ("opening_code") REFERENCES openings ("opening_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_black_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("black_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "elo_rating" INTEGER /* Current Elo rating of the player */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is active in the system */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., Admin, Organizer, Player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "openings" (
  "opening_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the opening */,
  "opening_name" TEXT /* Name of the opening */,
  "opening_description" TEXT /* Description of the opening */,
  "eco_code" TEXT /* ECO code of the opening */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the opening */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opening_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_controls" (
  "time_control" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the time control */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time control */,
  "base_time" INTEGER /* Base time of the time control */,
  "increment" INTEGER /* Increment of the time control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_control")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament organizer */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., Round Robin, Knockout) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tournament (e.g., Blitz, Rapid, Classical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "moves" INTEGER /* Number of moves in the game */,
  "checks" INTEGER /* Number of checks in the game */,
  "checkmates" INTEGER /* Number of checkmates in the game */,
  "stalemates" INTEGER /* Number of stalemates in the game */,
  "resignations" INTEGER /* Number of resignations in the game */,
  "timeouts" INTEGER /* Number of timeouts in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the player */,
  "performance" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_players" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_events" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id", "event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_evaluations" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)
